payload.description: Independent feasibility and consistency reviews superseded the original target-only ownership note: source retirement could erase dependency truth, raw DB copies are unsafe under WAL, and the old source runner must also be protected during handoff.
payload.impact: US-093 now uses a crash-durable target fence, changed non-runnable source proxies, checksummed completion receipts, WAL-safe CLI snapshots, a complete coupling ban, and coordinated source/target rollback evidence.

payload.description: Independent reviews found the first history-partition trace omitted several user tables and could replace state or logs before preserving open cross-repository dependency proxies.
payload.impact: US-097 now inventories every user table and foreign key, derives a partition-cutoff manifest, preserves all E11 proxy edges, retains the consumer tracking rule, and activates the DB/log epoch pair under a crash-recoverable validation fence.

payload.actions_taken: ["read required Harness sources and templates","inspected both repositories and remote refs","mapped code history database changesets worktrees CI installer and release coupling","delegated independent core target history consistency compliance and feasibility reviews","created accepted decision 0009 and E11 migration manifest","created twelve dependency-ordered story packets and fourteen net edges","registered replayable intake stories traces decision and reviewer interventions","corrected WAL protocol ownership proxy archive packaging and rollback findings","ran audit fresh rebuild contract tests exact DAG and idempotent apply checks"]
payload.decisions_made: ["keep repository-harness as the Harness template and CLI owner","make hoangnb24/symphony the Symphony source of truth","use filtered provenance then copy prove and remove","publish a consumer-neutral JSON CLI protocol with WAL-safe snapshots and CAS writes","use changed non-runnable source receipt proxies to preserve cross-repository dependencies","inventory every SQLite user table and activate DB plus logs as one crash-recoverable epoch","track no live operational changesets in either product while retaining the generic consumer rule","release target first and prove Symphony against both initial and cleaned Harness tags","perform no product move push deletion or implementation in this planning turn"]
payload.errors: ["initial planning traces omitted TRACE_SPEC status and matrix context reads and were preserved rather than rewritten","initial source-row retirement and owner labels would have erased dependency truth and were replaced","initial DB history packaging and rollback plans omitted WAL dirty-worktree dynamic-table and crash-order cases and were corrected","final reviewer follow-up exhausted its service quota after earlier material findings were incorporated so the root ran frozen-text consistency replay and fail-closed checks"]
payload.files_read: ["README.md","docs/HARNESS.md","docs/FEATURE_INTAKE.md","docs/ARCHITECTURE.md","docs/CONTEXT_RULES.md","docs/TOOL_REGISTRY.md","docs/TRACE_SPEC.md","docs/templates/decision.md","docs/templates/story.md","docs/templates/high-risk-story/overview.md","docs/templates/high-risk-story/design.md","docs/templates/high-risk-story/execplan.md","docs/templates/high-risk-story/validation.md","Cargo.toml","crates/harness-cli","crates/harness-symphony","crates/harness-symphony/src/work.rs","crates/harness-symphony/src/run.rs","crates/harness-symphony/src/sync.rs","crates/harness-symphony/src/doctor.rs","crates/harness-symphony/src/agent.rs","crates/harness-symphony/src/web.rs","crates/harness-symphony/web-ui/electron/backend.cjs","scripts/install-harness.sh","scripts/install-harness.ps1","scripts/validate-changeset-rebuild.sh","git status --short","git log and worktree inventories","scripts/bin/harness-cli query matrix","scripts/bin/harness-cli query dependencies","scripts/bin/harness-cli audit","scripts/validate-changeset-rebuild.sh","scripts/test-validate-changeset-rebuild.sh","/Users/themrb/.playstudios/arch-skills/skills/architecture-cookbook/SKILL.md","/Users/themrb/.playstudios/arch-skills/skills/create-adr/SKILL.md"]
payload.harness_friction: The live DB and committed changesets are different incomplete truth sets; three changesets mix product ownership; SQLite cannot enforce cross-repository dependencies; WAL file copies and 8.8 GB of dirty ignored worktrees make blanket moves or deletes unsafe; the current validator itself rebuilds Symphony history and must be replaced only after synthetic parity proof.
payload.notes: Detailed correction trace covers US-089 through US-100 and supersedes ownership/dependency details in traces 243-254 without deleting them. Final replay evidence before this trace: 12 stories, 14 net edges, 12 original planning traces, 2 correction interventions, 1 replayable intake, and 1 accepted decision. Product implementation validation was intentionally skipped because this turn produced strategy/work packets only; the frozen Rust/Web/Playwright/desktop baseline and planning rebuild/idempotence/audit checks are recorded separately.
payload.task_summary: Completed reviewed E11 strategy and dependency-safe work packets for separating Symphony
